title: Consolidated Gold Mine: The Industrial Colossus of Georgia
dek: A detailed profile of the Consolidated Gold Mine in Dahlonega, Georgia — once the largest gold mining operation east of the Mississippi, now a preserved museum of underground mining history.

title: The Dahlonega Gold Belt: America
dek: A comprehensive geological and historical survey of the Dahlonega Gold Belt in northern Georgia, tracing the tectonic forces that concentrated gold and the human drama that followed its discovery.

title: Elberton Granite: The Granite Capital of the World and Georgia
Georgia Kaolin: The Billion-Dollar White Gold of the Coastal Plain
dek: A comprehensive commodity report on Georgia

title: USGS MRDS Analysis: 2,000 Mine Locations Across Georgia
dek: A data-driven analysis of 2,000 mineral deposit records from the USGS Mineral Resources Data System (MRDS), mapping Georgia

title: Data Catalog: USGS Mineral Commodity Summaries & Georgia Mine Records
dek: A catalog entry documenting five publicly available datasets downloaded for the Georgia Mining Research project, including the USGS MRDS mine database, MCS 2025 full report, and commodity-specific data for clays, gold, and dimension stone.

title: Critical Mineral Indicators: Analysis of NURE Stream Sediment Geochemistry
dek: A data-driven analysis of Titanium, Rare Earth Elements, and Gold anomalies in Georgia

title: Heavy Mineral Sands of the Georgia Coastal Plain
dek: An analysis of titanium and zirconium resources in South Georgia, focusing on the Trail Ridge and Atlantic shoreline deposits.

title: The Alumino-Silicate Resources of Georgia: Kyanite and Sillimanite Analysis
